title: My Day Is Free and Joyful
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the belief that wealth must be serious and solemn, and allowing freedom and joy into daily life as standard
excerpt: A short energy statement from the Day 80 theme of a 12-week money programme. The release names the old view of wealth as something grave; the allow names freedom and joy as the actual daily texture of an abundant life.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 80 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use on mornings when wealth feels like a weight rather than a support, or when you notice yourself deferring enjoyment to a future that hasn't arrived yet.

content.text: A short energy statement from the Day 80 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 80: celebrate a daily life of freedom and joy. The statement releases the belief that abundance is something sober and replaces it with the real texture of a wealthy daily life.
I am ready to release the belief that wealth has to feel serious, measured, or heavy. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow freedom and joy as the actual daily texture of my abundant life. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 80 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
